author: Saiki77
description: Frame the local graph and outline in a clean, Publish-style right-sidebar card, with a one-click Graph / Incoming / Outgoing switcher. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Saiki77
manifest.description: Frame the local graph and outline in a clean, Publish-style right-sidebar card, with a one-click Graph / Incoming / Outgoing switcher.
manifest.name: Hub Sidebar

name: Hub Sidebar

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
v1.2.5: build the new-tab finder on Obsidian's own switcher classes (1:1)

Rebuilt the finder DOM with Obsidian's quick-switcher classes — .prompt,
.prompt-input-container, .prompt-input, .prompt-results, .suggestion-item,
.prompt-instructions — so the theme styles it identically to the real switcher
instead of a custom approximation. CSS now only overrides placement (inline,
centered), resets the empty-state's inherited text-align, and turns the floating
modal look into a stamped inline frame (no shadow, subtle border). The input's
lower divider and the footer hints are native. (Can't reparent the actual switcher
modal inline — it's an overlay with its own lifecycle — so this is the faithful copy.)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
v1.2.4: actually center the new-tab quote + native-styled results

Quote: the previous text-align centering never worked — browsers left-align a nowrap
line that overflows its box and spill it rightward. Wrap the text in a span and use a
flex parent (justify-content:center), which centers the overflow symmetrically
regardless of the empty-state container's layout.

Results: render rows with Obsidian's native suggestion-item / suggestion-empty classes
and force text-align:left (they were inheriting the empty-state's centering, which is
why they looked nothing like the switcher). Switcher row metrics + selection highlight.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
v1.2.3: new-tab finder styled like Obsidian's quick switcher

- Results now match the native switcher: full UI font size, switcher-style row
  padding, rounded selection highlight (--background-modifier-hover), and a taller
  scrollable list (40vh).
- The field keeps a lower divider even when empty ("not writing"); typing expands
  results below it, with a hint footer (navigate / open / clear) shown only then.
- Still stamped into the page (inset, no float shadow) rather than a modal.
- (Quote centering was fixed in 1.2.2: min-width:0 + width:100% so it no longer
  sizes to its nowrap content and drifts right.)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
v1.2.2: center the new-tab quote + make its styling configurable

- Fix: the quote sat right-of-center because, as a flex item, it sized to its
  (nowrap) content and overflowed rightward. min-width:0 + width:100% pin it to the
  page width so text-align centers it like the search box and links.
- New settings (persist in data.json, so updates never reset them): quote size, quote
  strength (colour nudge from the background), and search-box edge strength. Applied
  live via CSS variables (--hub-quote-size / --hub-quote-mix / --hub-search-strength).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
v1.2.1: embedded new-tab finder (inline, replaces the quick-switcher launch)

The new-tab search is now a real embedded fuzzy finder instead of a bar that opened
the quick switcher:
- Always-present input, focused when an empty tab becomes active; shows no results
  until you type.
- Typing fuzzy-matches notes (prepareFuzzySearch over markdown files), and the
  results expand in place inside the box, replacing the page's action links (host
  gets .hub-newtab-active, which hides .empty-state-action — no :has needed).
- Arrow up/down to move, Enter to open, Escape to clear; click opens in the tab.
- Cleaned up on unload / settings change; the active class is cleared too.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
v1.2.0: Templater template buttons + new-tab redesign

Templater buttons:
- Configurable icon buttons in each note's header (next to the reading-view toggle)
  that insert a bound Templater template into the current note. Settings list with an
  icon picker (searchable over Obsidian's registered icons), a template picker (over
  the Templater templates folder, or the whole vault if unset), and a tooltip.
- Uses Templater's append_template_to_active_file, guarded so buttons only appear when
  Templater is installed. Clicking activates the clicked note's pane first so the
  template lands in the right file (not whatever pane happens to be focused).
- Idempotent injection (purge tagged buttons before re-adding), re-applied on
  layout/active-leaf/file-open and on settings change, cleaned up on unload.

New-tab redesign:
- Quote: one line, bold, coloured as the page nudged slightly (an imprint), not grey.
- Search bar: an imprinted bar that opens the quick switcher (find or create a note)
  on click, replacing the inline full-text field.

Hardening: saveSettings no longer rejects on an IO error (Notice instead).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
v1.1.1: optional faint quote above the new-tab search

Adds a "New-tab quote" setting: a line shown large, light, and very faint (a
watermark, almost the background) centered above the new-tab search field. Empty by
default. The new-tab content (quote + search) is injected idempotently into the empty
view and re-rendered on settings changes; cleaned up on unload.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
v1.1.0: new-tab search field

Adds an optional vault search box to the empty "New tab" page (on by default,
toggle in settings). Press Enter to run Obsidian's core full-text search;
complements the page's built-in "Go to file" quick switcher. The field auto-focuses
when an empty tab becomes active.

Implementation: injected idempotently into the empty view (.empty-state-container ->
.empty-state -> view-content fallback) on layout/active-leaf changes, cleaned up on
unload and when the setting is off. Wired to the global-search plugin's
openGlobalSearch() with feature-detection + a Notice fallback. Styling uses plain
class selectors and core variables (no !important/:has).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
v1.0.8: drop all !important and :has from styles.css (submission lint)

The Obsidian community submission scanner warns on !important (37x) and :has (5x).
Both are now gone with no behavior change:

- !important: every override rule already uses a high-specificity selector
  (0,2,0 to 0,5,0) that beats core's low-specificity defaults (~0,1,0), and the
  Minimal theme sets no !important on any of these selectors, so plain specificity
  (plus plugin-after-theme load order for ties) wins. Verified against Minimal's
  theme.css and by an independent cascade review.
- :has: the parent-selection rules are replaced by JS marker classes. injectAll()
  tags each hub tab group's .workspace-tabs with .hub-tabs-host / .hub-tabs-outline
  (cleared each pass and on unload via clearTabGroupMarkers()); the stylesheet
  targets those classes instead of :has(...). The resize-handle rule drops an
  always-true :has(> .mod-right-split) guard.

No functional change; the framed sidebar, outline tiers, borderless look, tab-bar
hiding, and graph box all render as before. CSS cascade changes are best confirmed
live in Obsidian (Minimal) via BRAT before directory submission.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
v1.0.7: address submission-review warnings

- Use activeDocument instead of document for popout-window compatibility
  (clears the source-code review warning at the 17 flagged sites).
- Drop the partially-supported text-indent rule from the outline styles.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
v1.0.6: store-submission readiness

- Add LICENSE (MIT).
- manifest: author Justus -> Saiki77, set authorUrl, reword description to a
  verb-first, period-terminated, <250-char line with no 'obsidian'/'plugin'.
- versions.json + package.json -> 1.0.6.
- docs/submission/SUBMISSION.md: website submission flow (community.obsidian.md),
  replacing the obsolete obsidian-releases PR flow.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
v1.0.5: move the sidebar-toggle button from the ribbon to the status bar

Minimal's 'Hide ribbon' option hides ribbon icons entirely, so the optional
toggle never appeared. It now lives in the status bar (always visible), still
gated by the 'Right sidebar toggle button' setting. The hotkey command is
unchanged.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
v1.0.4: fix box height (explicit JS sizing), top-padding slider, center-on-screen + sidebar toggle

- Fix the broken graph box: Minimal forces the view to fill the pane height,
  overriding CSS aspect-ratio. The plugin now sets an explicit inline height
  (= box width / chosen ratio) that beats the theme and updates live, so the
  'Graph box shape' slider applies immediately with no reload.
- Add 'Graph box top padding' slider (controls how far down the box sits).
- Add 'Center note on screen' toggle: shifts the main editor column to the
  window center, compensating for open sidebars (CM6-safe transform).
- Add 'Toggle the right sidebar' command + optional ribbon icon.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: v1.0.3: remove the drop shadow on the mode-switcher container

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
v1.0.2: graph box shape control + divider toggle + lower offset

- Add 'Graph box shape' setting: a slider for the framed graph box aspect ratio
  (width/height, 1=square) with a live preview box below it in settings.
- Add 'Show sidebar divider line' toggle for the vertical editor/sidebar divider.
- Nudge the box/labels down (top inset 6px -> 16px).
- Replace the fixed height cap with aspect-ratio driven by --hub-graph-aspect.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
v1.0.1: fix right-edge clip on Minimal, add section headers, hide per-pane title bar

- Inset the framed box via parent padding instead of child margin, so the
  theme's forced width:100% on .view-content no longer overflows and clips the
  right edge (root cause on Minimal).
- Cap the graph box height so it reads as a card (--hub-graph-height).
- Inject 'Interactive graph' / 'Incoming links' / 'Outgoing links' / 'On this
  page' section labels above each box, Publish-style.
- Hide the per-pane .view-header title bar for the framed panes.
- New settings: show section labels, hide sidebar tab bar (off-by-default-safe
  warning: hiding the tab bar also hides other tabs in that group).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Hub Sidebar 1.0.0: Publish-style right sidebar with Graph/Incoming/Outgoing switcher

TypeScript plugin (esbuild build, eslint, tag-driven release workflow).
Frames the local graph, cleans the outline, removes sidebar borders, and adds
a clickable switcher that morphs the framed pane between local graph, backlinks,
and outgoing links.
